solutions.solution: (b) As it is given that on Tuesday at 1 : 00 pm the watch is one minute slow and on Thursday at 1 : 00 pm, it is 2 min fast; it means that the clock has gained 3 min in 48 h from Tuesday to Thursday. Now, to show the correct time, the clock needs to gain only 1 min starting from 1 : 00 pm on Tuesday. As, 3 min are gained in 48 h, 1 min is gained in 48/3 h = 16 h So the clock showed the correct time at 5 : 00 am on Wednesday i.e., 16 h after 1 : 00 pm on Tuesday.

(b) According to the question, Total time from 8 am of a particular day to 4 pm on the next day = 32 h. The clock loses 24 min in 24 h. So, 23 h 36 min of this clock = 24 h of the correct clock ⇒ 23 36/60 i.e., (23 + 3/5) h of this clock = 24 h of the correct clock ⇒ 118/5 h of this clock = 24 h of the correct clock So, 32 h of this clock = (32 × 5 × 24)/118 h of the correct clock = 32 h 30 min (approx) Therefore, the right time is 32 h 30 min (approx) after 8 am = 4 h 30 min = 4 : 30 pm

(d) According to the question, total time from Sunday noon (12 pm) to 4 pm the next Sunday = 7 days 4 h = 172 hours, Also, the watch gains in 172 h = 3 min + 5 min 36s = 3 + 5 36/60 = (3 + 5 3/5) min = 43/5 min ∴ Watch gains 3 min in = (3/43 × 172 h)/5 = (3 × 5 × 172)/43 h = 60 h = 2 days 12 h Therefore, the watch is correct after 2 days 12 h from Sunday, 12 noon i.e., at 12 am on Wednesday.

(b) ∴ Total time of class = 3 h 27 min and total time of rest = 5 × 3 = 15 min ∴ Total time of all periods = 3 h 27 min – 15 min = 3 h 12 min = 192 min ∴ Exact duration of each period = 192/4 = 48 min
(c) The clock is as shown in given figure. Clearly at 9 : 30 am, the hour hand will be between o and u.

(b) 20 min past 2 = 2 + 20/60 = 2 + 1/3 = 7/3 h Angle traced by hour hand in 7/3 h = 360°/12 × 7/3 = 70° Angle traced by minute hand in 20 min = 360°/60 × 20 = 120° ∴ Required angle = 120° – 70° = 50°
